name: br8n
description: A self-maintaining, portable personal knowledge base. Captures developer context in the background, distills it into a cross-repo graph, and asks for guidance at one seam: its schema. Skills: /br8n:pickup (where I was + cross-repo selector), /br8n:capture (save context), /br8n:search (grounded answer), /br8n:explore (gap-fill), /br8n:activity (cross-repo work graph), /br8n:schema (design/reshape the KG ontology). Backed by the br8n MCP server.
